evidence.findings: handleAddFile calls addAttachment(filePath), no 'Not yet implemented' toast
handleDrop extracts file.path and passes to addAttachment(filePath, file)
Hash and metadata from storeBlob response, no crypto.subtle.digest or generateSimpleHash
generateThumbnail preserved, called for image File objects
Validation runs for drag-drop (File object), but file picker path had no validation before storeBlob
generateSimpleHash and getImageDimensions removed, no dead code
Pre-existing cross-domain hash duplication (BlobStorageService vs security/crypto), not introduced by Story 11. Single path to storeBlob confirmed.
All 126 test suites pass, 0 regressions from signature change
handleAddFile calls addAttachment(filePath), storeBlob via IPC confirmed
handleDrop extracts file.path, passes to addAttachment(filePath, file)
Hash and metadata from storeBlob response, no browser-side hash
generateThumbnail preserved for image File objects
Both paths validated: drag-drop via validateFile, file picker via getFileInfo IPC for size check
No dead code, all functions used
No new duplication from Story 11. Pre-existing cross-domain duplication is architectural.
125/125 suites pass (timer.test.ts excluded - pre-existing crash from Story 03). 2823 tests pass, 1 skipped, 0 failed. Verified pre-existing via git stash test.

test_gate.evidence: 125/125 suites pass, 2823/2824 tests (1 skipped). crypto.test.ts excluded per jest.config.js (uses node:test runner, not Jest). timer.test.ts excluded due to pre-existing blossom-handlers crash (verified on committed code via git stash).

e2e_tests.evidence: 150 E2E tests pass (1 flaky unrelated to Story 11). media-upload.spec.ts: 3/3 tests pass - stores blob and returns metadata (624ms), sends message with attachment and uploads to blossom (2.6s), attachment renders in conversation (3.8s). Exit code 0.

patterns.pattern_description: File picker path calls addAttachment(filePath) without File object, skipping size validation before storeBlob IPC call

issues_addressed.issue: File picker path skips validation because no File object available
issues_addressed.action_taken: Added getFileInfo IPC call for lightweight file size retrieval. useAttachments now validates file size via IPC when File object not available.
issues_addressed.evidence: getFileInfo returns { size } via IPC; addAttachment validates size before storeBlob for both code paths
